creator: brent@jfi.uchicago.edu
text:
This bug affects other Samba versions besides 4.1, possibly any version using PAM/LDAP authentication through nss_ldap on FreeBSD 10.

Possible workaround: Not thoroughly tested yet, but it appears net/nss-pam-ldapd may provide a possible replacement for nss_ldap/pam_ldap combo that doesn't misbehave with Samba on FreeBSD 10.

Still don't know what broke regular nss_ldap though...
